mapper.sql: p.product_id, p.category_id, p.product_name, p.price, p.stock, p.image, p.description, p.status, p.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET del_flag = 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE del_flag = 0
